heading: Recall to active duty during war or national emergency
label: 2127 Recall to active duty during war or national emergency
text: In time of war or national emergency, the Secretary may order any regular officer on the retired list to active duty.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 331 of this title

Delegation of AuthorityFor delegation of authority under this section, as invoked by section 2 of Ex. Ord. No. 13223, , 66 F.R. 48201, to Secretary of Homeland Security when Coast Guard is not serving as part of Navy, see section 5 of Ex. Ord.
